summary: Implemented devmasterctl as a thin localhost devmasterd client with status, evidence, intake, and smoke commands. CLI smoke ran against a real localhost daemon, preserved token auth, used only local provider fixtures, and wrote runtime/cli-validation/devmasterctl-smoke.json.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Gate L review. Do not start Web Console, IDE extension, real provider, external repo, deploy, or PR work until Gate L passes.
notes: CLI commands call devmasterd HTTP APIs; they do not write daemon state or evidence directly.
The smoke command has a test-only daemon mode for local validation.
